questions: Does the FHR remain abnormal throughout at least three contractions? (Yes/No)
Is bleeding with intermittent or constant pain found on vaginal examination? (Yes/No)
Are signs of infection (fever, foul-smelling vaginal discharge) found on vaginal examination? (Yes/No)
Are FHR abnormalities persistent OR is thick meconium-stained amniotic fluid present? (Yes/No)
Is the fetal head not more than 1/5 above the symphysis pubis OR is the leading bony edge of the fetal head at 0 station? (Yes/No)
